content.text: 使用 `wiki-setup` skill 来初始化当前 vault。我先检查仓库现状和这个 skill 的具体流程，再直接落到可用的目录结构和基础配置上。
先读 skill 和当前目录；刚才是本地 shell 初始化错误，我重试一次。
本地命令还没起来，我换一种更小的调用方式确认 shell 是否可用，然后继续。

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the current vault contents before initializing the wiki?

options.name: Yes, proceed
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object Mode,Length,LastWriteTime,Name`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

content.text: 当前目录已经是一个 Obsidian vault：有 `.obsidian/`、`papers_sources/`、`Templates/`。我接着看现有配置和根目录缺什么，然后按 `wiki-setup` 的最小结构补齐，而不是重建。

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect existing root files such as .env or index notes before initializing the wiki?

options.name: Yes, proceed
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-ChildItem -Force -File | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the existing Obsidian config before adding wiki setup files?

options.name: Yes, proceed

Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-ChildItem -Force '.obsidian' | Select-Object Mode,Length,LastWriteTime,Name`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

content.text: 我已经确认根目录还没有 `index.md`、`log.md`、`.env` 这类基础文件。下一步会读取现有 Obsidian 配置，避免覆盖你的插件和工作区设置，只补最小必需项。

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the existing vault folders so I can align the wiki structure with your current notes?

options.name: Yes, proceed

Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Depth 1 'notes','papers_sources','Templates' | Select-Object FullName,PSIsContainer | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

content.text: 结构比较清楚了：这是一个已经在用的论文阅读 vault，`notes/` 放主笔记，`papers_sources/` 放论文来源材料。我要按这个实际结构做初始化，把 `papers_sources` 作为默认 source 路径写进 `.env`，并补 wiki 目录与索引。准备开始改文件。我会只动初始化所需的几处：补目录、写 `.env`、创建 `index.md` 和 `log.md`，再把空的 `.obsidian/app.json` / `appearance.json` 填成最小可用配置，不碰你的 `workspace.json` 和插件清单。在动手前我再做一个快速检索，确认仓库里有没有现成脚本或配置依赖 `.env` 里的变量名，避免我写出不兼容的键。

entries.content: Inspect current vault structure and infer safe defaults for wiki setup
Add missing wiki directories and root files (.env, index.md, log.md) without disturbing existing notes
Verify created structure and summarize how to use the initialized vault

content.text: `rg` 这个环境里没有，我改用 PowerShell 的文本检索继续确认约定。

content.title: Run Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern 'OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH|OBSIDIAN_SOURCES_DIR|CLAUDE_HISTORY_PATH|dotenv|\.env' | Select-Object Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-Table -AutoSize

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to search the vault for existing environment variable conventions before I initialize the wiki files?

options.name: Yes, proceed

Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern 'OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH|OBSIDIAN_SOURCES_DIR|CLAUDE_HISTORY_PATH|dotenv|\.env' | Select-Object Path,LineNumber,Line | Format-Table -AutoSize`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

content.text: 我在取一个固定时间戳写入初始化日志，然后直接落盘这些文件。

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to generate a timestamp for the wiki initialization log entry?

options.name: Yes, proceed
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss zzz"`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to create the standard wiki folders in this vault?

options.name: Yes, proceed

Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force 'concepts','entities','skills','references','synthesis','journal','projects','_archives' | Out-Null`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

# Wiki Index

This vault was initialized on 2026-04-08 11:13:50 +08:00.

## Existing Content

- `notes/`: working paper notes
- `papers_sources/`: raw paper sources and extracted artifacts
- `Templates/`: note templates

## Wiki Areas

- `concepts/`
- `entities/`
- `skills/`
- `references/`
- `synthesis/`
- `journal/`
- `projects/`
- `_archives/`

## Suggested Use

- Keep raw papers and exports in `papers_sources/`.
- Distill reusable ideas into `concepts/`.
- Put paper-specific summaries into `references/`.
- Use `synthesis/` for cross-paper comparisons and takeaways.

content.text: 校验通过，结构已经在位。我再看一眼变更范围，确保只落了这次初始化需要的文件和目录。
这个目录不是 git 仓库，所以没法用 `git status` 看 diff；我直接按文件结果做最终核对。再补查一下 `log.md` 和 `appearance.json`，然后给你可用的下一步。

entries.content: Inspect current vault structure and infer safe defaults for wiki setup
Add missing wiki directories and root files (.env, index.md, log.md) without disturbing existing notes
Verify created structure and summarize how to use the initialized vault

content.text:
已在当前 vault 完成初始化，默认用了这两个路径：

- `OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH=D:/paper_reading/paper_reading`
- `OBSIDIAN_SOURCES_DIR=D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/papers_sources`

我补了这些基础文件：[`.env`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/.env), [`index.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/index.md), [`log.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/log.md)，并创建了 `concepts/`、`entities/`、`skills/`、`references/`、`synthesis/`、`journal/`、`projects/`、`_archives/`。现有的 `notes/`、`papers_sources/`、`Templates/` 保留不动。还把 [`.obsidian/app.json`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/.obsidian/app.json) 和 [`.obsidian/appearance.json`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/.obsidian/appearance.json) 填成了最小可用配置。

如果你的 Claude 历史不在默认 `~/.claude`，再手动补一下 [`.env`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/.env) 里的 `CLAUDE_HISTORY_PATH`。下一步如果你要，我可以继续帮你做两件事之一：把当前论文阅读结构整理成更标准的 wiki 分类，或者给这个 vault 加一个可直接用的 Dataview 首页。
我怎么看这个wiki

autoMentionContext.noteName: Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation_zh
autoMentionContext.notePath: papers_sources/Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation/Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation_zh.md

content.text:
你现在打开的这个 Obsidian vault，本身就是这个 wiki。最直接的看法是：

先打开左侧文件栏，点 [index.md](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/index.md)。这个文件是我给你建的入口页。
你现在看到的 [Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation_zh.md](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/papers_sources/Delving%20into%20Decision-based%20Black-box%20Attacks%20on%20Semantic%20Segmentation/Delving%20into%20Decision-based%20Black-box%20Attacks%20on%20Semantic%20Segmentation_zh.md) 属于 `papers_sources/`，更像原始资料页，不是总览页。

你可以这样理解现在这个 vault：

- `index.md`：wiki 入口
- `notes/`：你的论文阅读笔记
- `papers_sources/`：论文原文、翻译、源码包这类原始材料
- `references/`：适合放“单篇论文的标准化摘要”
- `concepts/`：适合放可复用概念，比如 black-box attack、semantic segmentation attack
- `synthesis/`：适合放跨论文对比和总结

如果你想“看 wiki 的关系图”，在 Obsidian 左侧点 Graph View，就能看到页面之间的连接。但前提是这些页面之间要有 `[[双链]]`，现在刚初始化，图谱还不会很丰富。

如果你要，我下一步可以直接帮你做其中一件事：

1. 把你当前这篇论文整理成一页标准 `references/` 页面，并和 `notes/`、`papers_sources/` 连起来
2. 给你做一个更像首页的 `index.md`，带 Dataview 列表和论文导航
为什么是英文的

autoMentionContext.noteName: Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation
autoMentionContext.notePath: notes/Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation.md

content.text:
因为我初始化时做了两个保守选择：

1. 你这个 vault 里原本就主要是英文命名。
   比如 [`notes/Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/notes/Delving%20into%20Decision-based%20Black-box%20Attacks%20on%20Semantic%20Segmentation.md) 和 `papers_sources/` 里的论文目录都已经是英文标题。

2. 论文名我没有擅自翻译。
   这类页面通常直接沿用论文原题，能减少重名、断链、检索不一致的问题。

另外，我新建的 [`index.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/index.md) 和 [`log.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/log.md) 也用了英文，是因为我先按一个通用的最小模板起好了结构，没有先做中文本地化。

如果你想要中文化，我可以直接帮你改成这两种风格之一：

- 全中文：首页、栏目说明、日志都改中文，论文页也加中文别名
- 中英混合：文件名保留英文，页面标题和导航改中文

如果你愿意，我下一步可以直接把首页改成中文版本。
我要中文的
我把首页和基础说明改成中文，不改现有英文论文文件名和目录名，这样不会打断你现在的链接和资料结构。接下来我先看一眼当前首页内容，然后直接本地化这些可见页面。
我会把可见入口改成中文：首页、日志页和 `.env` 里的注释都本地化，同时把首页做成更适合当前论文阅读结构的中文导航。文件名和目录名先不改，避免断链。补丁命中失败了，像是 `.env` 带了 BOM/编码差异。我先查一下实际文件内容和行号，再用更稳的方式改，不会动别的文件。

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the current index file with line numbers so I can patch it safely?

options.name: Yes, proceed

Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command $i=1; Get-Content 'index.md' | ForEach-Object {('{0,3}: {1}' -f $i,$_); $i++ }`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the current log file with line numbers so I can patch it safely?

options.name: Yes, proceed
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command $i=1; Get-Content 'log.md' | ForEach-Object {('{0,3}: {1}' -f $i,$_); $i++ }`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

rawInput.reason: Do you want to allow me to inspect the .env file encoding so I can patch it safely?

options.name: Yes, proceed
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -Command Format-Hex '.env' | Select-Object -First 8 | Out-String`
No, and tell Codex what to do differently

content.text: 定位清楚了，问题只在 `.env` 的 BOM。首页和日志可以正常补丁，我先把这两个用户可见页面切到中文，再处理 `.env` 注释。

title: Wiki \u9996\u9875

# Wiki \u9996\u9875

- \u5f53\u524d\u8bba\u6587\u7b14\u8bb0\uff1a[[Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation]]
- \u5f53\u524d\u4e2d\u6587\u8d44\u6599\uff1a[[Delving into Decision-based Black-box Attacks on Semantic Segmentation_zh]]

## \u76ee\u5f55\u8bf4\u660e

- `notes/`\uff1a\u8bba\u6587\u9605\u8bfb\u7b14\u8bb0
- `papers_sources/`\uff1a\u8bba\u6587\u539f\u6587\u3001\u7ffb\u8bd1\u3001\u6e90\u7801\u5305\u7b49\u539f\u59cb\u6750\u6599
- `references/`\uff1a\u5355\u7bc7\u8bba\u6587\u6458\u8981
- `concepts/`\uff1a\u53ef\u590d\u7528\u6982\u5ff5
- `synthesis/`\uff1a\u8de8\u8bba\u6587\u603b\u7ed3
- `projects/`\uff1a\u4e13\u9898\u9879\u76ee
- `_archives/`\uff1a\u5f52\u6863

## \u4f7f\u7528\u5efa\u8bae

- \u539f\u59cb\u8d44\u6599\u653e\u5728 `papers_sources/`
- \u9605\u8bfb\u7ed3\u8bba\u4f18\u5148\u6c89\u6dc0\u5230 `references/`\u3001`concepts/`\u3001`synthesis/`
- \u60f3\u770b\u8fde\u63a5\u5173\u7cfb\u65f6\uff0c\u6253\u5f00 Graph View
"""

title: Wiki \u65e5\u5fd7

content.text:
已经改成中文了。

现在这两个页面是中文的：
[`index.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/index.md)
[`log.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/log.md)

我保留了英文文件名和目录名，只把你实际看到的首页内容和导航改成中文，这样不会把现有链接弄断。首页里现在也直接放了你当前论文笔记和中文资料页的入口。

如果 Obsidian 还没立刻刷新，重新点一下 [`index.md`](D:/paper_reading/paper_reading/index.md) 或切走再切回来就行。要的话我下一步可以继续把当前这篇论文的笔记页也中文化，比如加中文标题、中文栏目和双链。
